**Alitmus test for plant consciousness: Pattern-Temporal Synergy in arelation-first ontology.** — Communicative & integrative biology (). PMID: 41098843. Score: 27. Plant cognition has progressed from anecdote to rigor, yet the field still lacks aquantitative test for when distributed plant activity crosses into unified - perhaps conscious - processing. Iintroduce Pattern-Temporal Synergy (PTS), asubstrate-agnostic metric rooted in Dynergeia, arelation-first ontology in which consciousness is reflexive coherence among five universal patterns - self-reference, division-creation, information integration, responsiveness, and flux - phase-locked inside asy
